gherkin:
When the user click on the "Overrides" tile on the dashboard
And the user click on the Playback tab right next to the Session tab
And the user clicks on the delete icon on an Okta ID from the table
And the user clicks on the red "Delete" button
Then the user should land on the Session page by default
And the user should be on the Playback page
And the user should see a pop up which displays "Cancel" and "Delete" button
And the user should see a success override deletion message "Playback Override successfully deleted"
!xray-attachment://8adae929-3f5e-45f4-9179-e856f8476e83|width=291,height=51!

steps.action:
*When* the user click on the "Overrides" tile on the dashboard

*And* the user click on the Playback tab right next to the Session tab

*And* the user clicks on the delete icon on an Okta ID from the table 

*And* the user clicks on the red "Delete" button
steps.result:
*Then* the user should land on the Session page by default

*And* the user should be on the Playback page

*And* the user should see a pop up which displays "Cancel" and "Delete" button

*And* the user should see a success override deletion message "Playback Override successfully deleted"

!xray-attachment://8adae929-3f5e-45f4-9179-e856f8476e83|width=291,height=51!
